source_boundary.basis: Committed headers, Tahoe contract helpers, local source, and committed reverse-engineering corpus files in this repository.

contracts.title: Apple80211 current-link read probes

required_outputs: Apple-specific no-cache and no-value errors where the reference does not synthesize state
payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Null or unsupported carrier paths must return the recovered Apple error code, not generic ENXIO-style failure.

transitions: not-associated probes publish empty success carriers
run-state probes publish current BSSID/SSID/channel/rate values
link-down clears current-link state before consumers poll

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Model current-link producer and consumer transitions explicitly.
Capture Tahoe polling behavior during scan, join, DHCP, roam, and wake.

contracts.title: Association request and Tahoe WCL candidate carrier

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Reject non-0x3ad8 hidden candidate carriers and over-capacity RSN IE lengths with Apple-invalid status.

transitions: candidate-selected -> associate-issued only after BSSID/SSID/auth material is copied
associate-issued -> auth-pending when RSN/PMF material exists
auth-pending -> link-up-or-failed by WCL connect complete or abort

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Produce and consume every recovered association carrier field with Apple-compatible invalid-payload behavior.
Order association candidate selection, auth, connect-complete, abort, and retry transitions.

contracts.title: Authentication, RSN IE, cipher key, and PMK carriers

payload_shape.secret_handling: Inventory requires metadata-only verification; raw PMK/PSK/key bytes must not be logged.

transitions: PMK eligibility is cleared on reset, leave, disassoc, join abort, and PMKSA clear
PTK and GTK installs each publish handshake progress
RSN done is not forced without observed key-carrier completion

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Cover PMK, PTK, GTK, RSN IE, and invalid cipher/error cases.
Classify key-carrier misses as recoverable or nonrecoverable without silent RSN success.

contracts.title: Scan request, scan result, WCL channel, and BSS info carriers

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Over-capacity IE blobs must truncate or reject according to the recovered carrier boundary; empty scan caches must not fabricate APs.

transitions: scan-requested -> scan-running only after request carrier validation
scan-running -> results-published posts WCL scan result and updates cache
scan-running -> scan-aborted posts abort-complete where required

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Capture real Tahoe scan AP count, WCL channels, and BSS info parity.

contracts.title: WCL connect-complete event and join completion bulletin

transitions: join-pending -> connect-complete-published when the carrier matches WCL consumer size
success status advances link-up producers
failure status advances diagnostics and retry or abort paths

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Validate WCL connect-complete payload bytes and error status mapping.

contracts.title: WCL action-frame send and progress tracking

transitions: frame-accepted -> tx-in-progress sets action progress
tx-in-progress -> overdue after 0x12d ms
scan request rejects while action frame is in progress

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Enforce progress, overdue, completion, and scan-reject transitions.

contracts.title: NDP offload payload and hidden callback chain

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Null carrier returns raw Apple invalid-argument status.

transitions: valid carrier caches address count and link-local seed
cache update queues hidden notification before virtual ioctl set

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Prove NDP carrier parsing, count clamping, and two-stage transport order.

contracts.title: USB host notification payload split

payload_shape.conditional_transport: A second change payload is emitted only when change < 2.

transitions: valid carrier updates present/change caches
transport order is hidden callback, present IOVar, optional change IOVar

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Verify present/change split and optional second command.

contracts.title: BT coexistence profile, active profile, and 2G chain disable

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Reject band >= 5, mode outside 1..4, and profile index >= 10 with Apple invalid-argument status.

transitions: profile-valid sets profileValidMask bit for the selected index
active and chain-disable commands update independent owner state

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Classify invalid BT coexistence profile failures without generic fallback.

contracts.title: Ranging authenticate and proximity owner routing

required_fields: owner id gate for hidden callback
payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Null carrier or zero PMK length returns Apple ranging invalid status.

transitions: role 4 with valid proximity owner posts hidden callback
all valid carriers issue the two IOVar primes before the command

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Preserve ranging transport order and hidden-callback gate.

contracts.title: TX power cap bypass and dual-power eligibility

required_fields: enabled bit from first payload byte
payload_shape.send_gate: Bypass command is sent only when both dual-power values are not -1.

transitions: syncDualPowerMode recomputes send eligibility
bypass setter caches local state even when command is not eligible

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Verify send gating and cached bypass payload semantics.

contracts.title: Controller multicast, promiscuous mode, queue depth, and coalesce properties

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Oversized multicast payloads and unsupported commands return recovered Apple status codes.

transitions: multicast update is atomic with count and address table
queue and coalesce publication must precede runtime datapath assertions

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Add ordered producer/consumer checks for multicast and queue/coalesce publication.

contracts.title: Skywalk interface registration, queues, pools, and logical link

abi_requirements: TX callback unsigned int return type
RX callback unsigned int return type

transitions: queue registration precedes BSD visibility
stop drains queues before logical-link deregistration
packet pools outlive queue teardown

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Prove queue and pool lifecycle ordering and backpressure behavior.
Mutation tests must fail if queue/pool teardown ordering regresses.

contracts.title: IO80211 network packet class and packet pool allocation

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Base packet allocation must not be presented as Apple packet scratch support.

transitions: allocation validates packet metaclass before input handoff
packet ownership transfers only through queue/pool APIs

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Validate packet type, packet class, and scratch ownership boundaries.

contracts.title: Apple packet scratch and packet_info_tag ABI

transitions: RX path fills service class/TID/VLAN before IO80211 input consumers
TX path writes AC/VLAN/status before completion accounting

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Mutation coverage must catch offset, size, and ownership regressions in packet metadata.

contracts.title: RX completion producer and IO80211 input handoff

payload_shape.ownership_rule: Packets remain owned by queue/pool runtime until accepted upward or returned.

transitions: RX completion may exist before operational link-up
stop/reset must prevent callbacks after queue destruction

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Capture RX EAPOL, DHCP, and data delivery from a real Tahoe Wi-Fi session.

contracts.title: TX submission, output, completion, and accounting

payload_shape.backpressure_rule: Callback return values must represent accepted/deferred/rejected packets consistently; success cannot be reported for packets whose ownership was not transferred.

transitions: packet accepted by TX callback must reach completion or explicit drop accounting
backpressure must not reorder producer/consumer visibility

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Prove ordered producer/consumer queues with backpressure-safe TX completion.

contracts.title: Hidden interface flow queues, packet timestamping, and pipe surfaces

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Null virtual interface creation returns the recovered Apple error status.

transitions: flow request/release counts must balance
timestamp enable and disable alter packet timestamping state without tearing down pipes

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Track hidden-interface flow/timestamp state transitions and queue ownership.

contracts.title: APSTA, SoftAP, and HostAP owner surface

required_fields: SoftAP params fields from owner offsets
payload_shape.publication_rule: HostAP capability bits may be published only after APSTA owner topology and carriers exist.

transitions: primary STA AP_MODE normal path returns unsupported and must not fake AP state
APSTA lifecycle is separate from primary STA join/auth/data path
runtime acceptance must close AP/APSTA gaps or prove them out of target scope

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Runtime evidence must either close AP/APSTA support or prove it outside the selected target scope.
Final acceptance must not advertise HostAP unless APSTA owner evidence exists.

contracts.title: QoS, DynSAR, LQM, WMM, AVC, and congestion control

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Invalid LQM threshold bytes and unsupported congestion-control paths return recovered Apple statuses.

transitions: LQM config accepts only recovered valid intervals and threshold bytes
DynSAR fail-safe mode is computed from monotonic tick delta

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Validate LQM, QoS, DynSAR, and congestion-control payload boundaries.
Diagnostics must distinguish unsupported QoS feature from malformed payload.

contracts.title: Power, WoW, sleep, and wake contract

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Unsupported power carriers must fail explicitly instead of silently mutating runtime state.

transitions: systemWillSleep triggers scan/join/net/GAS quiesce events
systemAwake triggers wake events and requires reconnect evidence
wake reconnect must not reuse stale key or scan state silently

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Capture wake reconnect success and power/wake recovery in a real Tahoe session.
Model sleep/wake recovery transitions for scan, join, data, and keys.

contracts.title: AWDL, P2P, and virtual interface Apple80211 surface

required_fields: virtual role/parent unsupported code on primary STA
payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Primary STA virtual role/parent must return Apple-specific not-virtual-interface status 0xe082280e.

transitions: primary STA virtual role/parent probes do not create virtual state
AWDL/P2P carriers update separate virtual-interface caches

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Make virtual/AWDL/P2P state transitions explicit and separate from primary STA.

contracts.title: Apple-compatible error return and status normalization

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Each contract reports the recovered status for null, malformed, unsupported, and transport-rejected cases.

transitions: malformed payload never advances producer state
recoverable errors remain observable by diagnostics
normalization applies only to documented Apple-compatible cases

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Cover recoverable/nonrecoverable errors and prove no silent degradation.

contracts.title: Roam, reassociation, roam lock, user cache, and BG scan control

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Null or malformed WCL roam controls must return recovered Apple status without stale-link publication.

transitions: reassoc clears external PMK eligibility before issuing new request
BG scan config updates scan producer before roam decision
reassoc failure does not publish link-up success

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Capture roaming/reconnect scenarios with at least two BSSIDs.
Order BG scan, roam lock, reassoc, key reset, and link publication.

contracts.title: Vendor IE and custom association IE producer
driver_facing_surface: join owner vs commander owner routing

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Reject data->ie_len beyond carrier capacity with raw Apple invalid-argument status.

transitions: custom association IE routes to join owner
generic vendor IE routes to commander owner
cache update precedes transport dispatch

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Verify IE routing, carrier bounds, and cache-before-dispatch semantics.

contracts.title: Link changed, link-down, and driver reset event delivery

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Failed link events must publish failure reason rather than silent success.

transitions: link up/down events feed WCL net manager and legacy consumers
driver reset fans out to join, scan, GAS, config, net, BG scan, and nearby managers

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Prove event fanout transitions and reset recovery ordering.

contracts.title: BSS manager, peer manager, peer, and interface monitor primitives

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: BSS/peer accessors must return empty or Apple-specific no-value status rather than invented peer state.

transitions: BSS cache feeds scan and connect-complete carriers
peer manager lookup gates RX/TX datapath and monitor reporting

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Represent BSS/peer lifecycle and datapath lookup ordering explicitly.

contracts.title: Intel HAL and OpenBSD net80211 bridge to Apple-facing contracts

payload_shape.invalid_payload_behavior: Backend misses must surface as explicit Apple-compatible diagnostics and not as fabricated IO80211 success.

transitions: OpenBSD state transitions must drive Apple current-link and WCL event producers
EAPOL/key lifecycle must bridge host supplicant state to IO80211 RSN completion

roadmap_work.closure_requirement: Prove real scan/join/auth/DHCP/data behavior with Intel-backed HAL in Tahoe.
Classify HAL/backend misses without silent degradation.

gap_ledger.title: Payload and IO80211 carrier parity work
acceptance_mapping: all required payload shapes are produced/consumed
invalid payload/error semantics match accepted Apple-compatible behavior
payload evidence is captured in deterministic tests

gap_ledger.title: Producer, consumer, and state-machine ordering work
acceptance_mapping: association/auth/scan/data-path state machines are explicit
producer/consumer queues are ordered and backpressure-safe
state recovery after errors/wake is verified

gap_ledger.title: Tahoe runtime scan, join, auth, DHCP, data, roam, and wake evidence
acceptance_mapping: scan/join/auth/DHCP/data transfer works in Tahoe
roaming/reconnect/power/wake scenarios are covered
runtime equivalence is captured from a real guest Wi-Fi session

gap_ledger.title: Apple-compatible diagnostics and recoverable/nonrecoverable failure semantics
acceptance_mapping: diagnostics match system expectations
recoverable/nonrecoverable errors are classified
no silent degradation is accepted

gap_ledger.title: Deterministic verification and mutation coverage for contract regressions
acceptance_mapping: Progress kernel simulator and no-paper-closure mutation coverage pass against committed state
contract regressions are caught by deterministic checks

gap_ledger.title: Final parity acceptance rollup and rollback evidence
acceptance_mapping: final Apple Wi-Fi parity release acceptance is ready after prior contract evidence
rollback recovery checks are present

gap_ledger.title: AP/APSTA owner reconstruction or out-of-scope proof
acceptance_mapping: AP/APSTA gaps are either closed or proven out of target scope
HostAP capability is not published without APSTA owner evidence

gap_ledger.title: Power, wake, reconnect, and roam runtime proof
acceptance_mapping: roaming/reconnect/power/wake scenarios are covered
state recovery after errors/wake is verified

payload_acceptance: SSID, BSSID, current network, scan result, and state carriers are zeroed and versioned before publication.
Not-associated reads return Apple-compatible empty success or no-value status, never generic transport failure.
state_machine_acceptance: Consumer polling observes detached -> scanning -> associating -> run/link-down transitions in order.
Link-down clears current-link payloads before later read probes.

payload_acceptance: Hidden association carrier length is exactly 0x3ad8 and required offsets match TahoeAssociationContracts.
Candidate BSSID, SSID, auth, RSN IE, PMF, and hotspot flags are bounded and copied before transport dispatch.
state_machine_acceptance: Candidate selection precedes association issue.
Association cannot publish link-up until auth/key and connect-complete producers advance.

payload_acceptance: AUTH_TYPE, RSN_IE, CIPHER_KEY, and CUR_PMK carriers are parsed without logging raw secrets.
Invalid cipher/key/PMK payloads return recovered Apple status values.
state_machine_acceptance: PTK and GTK installs are separately observable before RSN done.
PMK eligibility clears on reset, leave, disassoc, join abort, and PMKSA clear.

payload_acceptance: Scan request, channel info, BSS info, and BG scan cache payloads respect recovered length and count limits.
Empty caches remain empty and do not synthesize AP records.
state_machine_acceptance: Scan request advances through requested, running, results-published, or aborted states.
WCL scan result publication and cache updates are ordered.

payload_acceptance: Connect-complete event matches the WCL consumer 0xa4-byte payload boundary.
Status, BSSID, association ID, channel, and negotiated security fields are deterministic.
state_machine_acceptance: Connect-complete success gates link-up publication.
Connect-complete failure gates retry, abort, and diagnostics without fake link-up.

payload_acceptance: Frame length <= 0x707 and V1/V2 transport selection follows firmware generation threshold.
Scan-reject and overdue statuses match TahoePayloadBuilders constants.
state_machine_acceptance: Action-frame progress is set when transmit starts and clears on completion or overdue.
Scan requests reject while action-frame progress is active.

payload_acceptance: NDP count is capped at four and link-local seed is derived from the first address.
Null carriers return raw Apple invalid-argument status.
state_machine_acceptance: Carrier cache update precedes hidden callback.
Hidden callback precedes virtual ioctl set.

payload_acceptance: Sequence, change, and present dwords are read from recovered offsets.
Second change payload is emitted only when change < 2.
state_machine_acceptance: Present/change cache update precedes hidden callback and IOVar sends.
Transport order is deterministic.

payload_acceptance: Mode, band, profile index, active profile, and chain-disable fields match Tahoe payload builders.
Invalid mode, band, or index returns Apple invalid-argument status.
state_machine_acceptance: Profile valid mask changes only after profile validation.
Active profile and chain-disable updates are independent and observable.

payload_acceptance: Role and PMK length offsets match recovered payload shape.
Zero PMK length returns Apple ranging invalid status.
state_machine_acceptance: Two IOVar primes precede virtual ioctl and async command.
Hidden callback posts only for role 4 with valid proximity owner.

payload_acceptance: Enabled bit and dual-power eligibility are represented explicitly.
Bypass send is suppressed until primary and secondary dual-power values are present.
state_machine_acceptance: Bypass payload cache updates even while send-ineligible.
Eligibility recomputes when dual-power owner state changes.

payload_acceptance: Multicast IOVAR capacity, 0x20 entry limit, and 6-byte entries match TahoeControllerContracts.
Queue depth and coalesce properties are published with Apple defaults or recovered values.
state_machine_acceptance: Multicast count and address table update atomically.
Queue/coalesce publication precedes datapath runtime assertions.

payload_acceptance: Registration info, queue array, queue count, TX pool, and RX pool are all present.
TX/RX callback ABI uses unsigned int return type.
state_machine_acceptance: Queues register before BSD visibility.
Stop drains queues before logical-link teardown and pool release.

payload_acceptance: IO80211NetworkPacket class size and packet type classification match recovered headers.
Scratch-owner limitations are explicit and not represented as complete Apple packet parity.
state_machine_acceptance: Packet allocation validates class before input handoff.
Packet ownership returns through queue/pool completion or drop paths.

payload_acceptance: Every named packet_info_tag offset and struct size matches compile-time assertions.
RX/TX metadata fields are not silently ignored by parity tests.
state_machine_acceptance: RX tag population precedes IO80211 input consumers.
TX status and accounting metadata precede completion publication.

payload_acceptance: RX packet, tag, ether header, count, and pass/drop outputs are all represented.
Ownership is explicit until handoff, return, or drop.
state_machine_acceptance: RX completion can exist before IP link-up but not after queue destruction.
EAPOL, DHCP, and data packets follow the same ownership discipline.

payload_acceptance: TX submission, AC metadata, TX status, queue space, and completion stats are all covered.
Backpressure return semantics do not claim transfer for unowned packets.
state_machine_acceptance: Accepted TX packets reach completion or explicit drop accounting.
Backpressure does not reorder producer/consumer visibility.

payload_acceptance: Flow metadata and event/log/snapshot pipe offsets match TahoeHiddenInterfaceContracts.
Null virtual-interface operations return recovered Apple status.
state_machine_acceptance: Flow queue request and release counts balance.
Timestamping enable/disable does not tear down pipe surfaces.

payload_acceptance: SoftAP params, stats, HostAP mode, and Wi-Fi network info IE carriers require APSTA owner topology.
Primary STA AP_MODE normal path remains unsupported and does not mutate AP state.
state_machine_acceptance: HostAP capability is not advertised before APSTA owner creation and carrier support.
AP/APSTA support is closed or explicitly proven out of target scope before final runtime acceptance.

payload_acceptance: LQM intervals, invalid threshold range, DynSAR offsets, and congestion-control bit match recovered constants.
Unsupported QoS features are reported with recovered Apple status values.
state_machine_acceptance: LQM and QoS updates publish before datapath behavior depends on them.
DynSAR fail-safe state is computed from tick delta and exits deterministically.

payload_acceptance: Power, powersave, WoW, and sleep/wake event carriers are represented separately.
Unsupported power payloads do not silently mutate runtime state.
state_machine_acceptance: Sleep quiesces scan, join, net, and GAS producers.
Wake reconnect does not reuse stale key, scan, or link state silently.

payload_acceptance: AWDL sync, BSSID, election, channel sequence, P2P, and virtual interface carriers are inventoried.
Primary STA virtual role/parent probes return 0xe082280e.
state_machine_acceptance: Primary STA probes do not create virtual state.
AWDL/P2P operations update virtual-interface state separately from primary STA join state.

payload_acceptance: Null, malformed, unsupported, no-memory, and transport-rejected cases use recovered Apple status values.
Documented success normalization is limited to known Apple-compatible status values.
state_machine_acceptance: Malformed payloads do not advance producer state.
Recoverable and nonrecoverable failures remain observable for diagnostics.

payload_acceptance: Roam profile, reassoc, roam lock, user cache, BG scan, and BG params carriers are represented.
Malformed roam controls do not publish stale link-up success.
state_machine_acceptance: Reassoc clears external PMK eligibility before issuing a new request.
BG scan and roam lock state are ordered before roam decision and reconnect evidence.

payload_acceptance: IE length is bounded by the apple80211_ie_data carrier capacity.
Custom association IE condition routes selector 552 to the join owner; generic vendor IE routes to commander owner.
state_machine_acceptance: IE cache update precedes transport dispatch.
Association IE and vendor IE caches remain distinct.

payload_acceptance: Link-changed payload includes BSSID, link_state, interface_type, reason_code, and reserved fields.
Driver reset is a null-payload event and does not fabricate link state.
state_machine_acceptance: Link-up/down events feed WCL and legacy consumers in order.
Driver reset fans out to join, scan, GAS, config, net, BG scan, and nearby managers.

payload_acceptance: BSS beacon, peer identity, RSSI, capability, credit, and monitor reporter carriers are represented.
No-BSS and no-peer cases return empty or Apple-specific no-value status rather than invented state.
state_machine_acceptance: BSS cache feeds scan result and connect-complete carriers.
Peer lifecycle gates datapath lookup and monitor reporting.

payload_acceptance: OpenBSD net80211 state, desired SSID/BSSID, keys, EAPOL, rate/channel/RSSI, and HAL callbacks map to Apple-facing carriers.
Backend misses surface as explicit Apple-compatible diagnostics.
state_machine_acceptance: OpenBSD state transitions drive Apple current-link and WCL event producers.
EAPOL/key lifecycle bridges host supplicant state to IO80211 RSN completion.
